args.sql: WITH holdings_005827 AS (SELECT stock_code, stock_name FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = '005827' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 200), holdings_003095 AS (SELECT stock_code, stock_name FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = '003095' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 200) SELECT h1.stock_code AS 股票代码, h1.stock_name AS 股票名称 FROM holdings_005827 h1 INNER JOIN holdings_003095 h2 ON h1.stock_code = h2.stock_code LIMIT 200;
